channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ramaphosa Faces Legal Challenge Over Impeachment Proceedings
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa's legal battle against parliamentary impeachment proceedings has entered a critical phase, with the Western Cape High Court set to deliver its judgment on an urgent applicati...

item.title: Alberta's oil production expansion faces challenges in demand, labor, and emissions amid carbon capture plans
item.description: The article discusses Alberta's ambitious plan to expand oilsands production while advancing a $16-billion carbon capture project. The province has agreed to implement financial supports to encourage ...

item.title: US and Chinese Foreign Ministers Attend ASEAN Meetings in Metro Manila Next Week
item.description: The Department of Foreign Affairs (DFA) confirmed that US Secretary of State Marco Rubio and Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi will attend the Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) and related...

item.title: Tanzania aims to expand geothermal energy capacity to 130MW by 2030
item.description: Tanzania is targeting a contribution of up to 130 megawatts (MW) of geothermal electricity by 2030 as part of efforts to diversify its energy mix and enhance power supply reliability. This goal aligns...

item.title: Celebrity Barber Sam Kitiki Battles GIST Cancer and Financial Struggles
item.description: Sam Kitiki, a well-known Kenyan celebrity barber, has shared a heartfelt video revealing his ongoing battle with GIST cancer and the financial challenges he faces. The illness has left him visibly fra...

item.title: CAC enforces compliance by removing non-compliant companies
item.description: The Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC) has started removing 100,000 companies from Nigeria's corporate register as part of its effort to enforce compliance with the Companies and Allied Matters Act (C...

item.title: MI5 provided false evidence to courts in neo-Nazi spy case
item.description: A damning report by Sir John Goldring reveals that MI5 gave false evidence to three courts regarding its 'neither confirm nor deny' (NCND) policy towards a violent neo-Nazi informant, Agent X. The inv...

item.title: Staff Assist Elderly and Disabled Voters in Ol Kalaou By-Election
item.description: A video capturing staff at a Nyandarua technical training centre assisting elderly and physically challenged voters during the Ol Kalou by-election has sparked widespread admiration. The clip shows vo...

item.title: Vusi Moyo makes Springbok debut after impressive training
item.description: Young flyhalf Vusi Moyo, 20, is set for his Springbok debut against Wales after impressing during training sessions. The former Junior Bok, who missed the first five months of the season due to injury...

item.title: AFL Match: Geelong Cats Maintain Lead as St Kilda Saints Fightback
item.description: In a thrilling AFL clash at the GMHBA Stadium, Geelong Cats entered the match with a strong lead, showcasing dominance in the first half. However, St Kilda Saints mounted a spirited fightback, with ke...

item.title: India’s First Privately Developed Orbital-Class Rocket Vikram-1 Aims for Test Flight on July 18
item.description: India’s first privately developed orbital-class rocket, Vikram-1, is set for its maiden test flight on July 18, 2026, from the Satish Dhawan Space Centre in Sriharikota. Private space launch company S...

item.title: EU mandates Google to share search data and open Android for rival AI companies
item.description: The European Union has introduced new regulations requiring Google to share anonymized search data with rival AI firms and open its Android operating system to allow alternative AI services to functio...

item.title: Puri Rath Yatra Incident: One Fatality Reported
item.description: During the Puri Rath Yatra festival on July 16, 2026, a stampede occurred at a crowded event, resulting in one fatality and over 100 people fainting. Authorities swiftly deployed medical teams and set...

item.title: Nigerian Logistics Firm Caverton Expands into Electric Ferries and Global Partnerships Amid Oil Industry Shifts
item.description: Caverton Offshore Support Group, a leading Nigerian logistics provider to the oil and gas sector, is adapting its business model as international oil companies (IOCs) divest onshore and shallow-water ...

item.title: Attack on Bannu's Miryan Police Station Leaves 1 Dead, 14 Injured
item.description: A terrorist attack on Bannu's Miryan Police Station resulted in the martyrdom of a police official and injuries to six security personnel and four civilians. The attack, which occurred on Wednesday ni...

item.title: Diddy Sells $55 Million Star Island Mansion Amid Prison Sentence
item.description: Sean 'Diddy' Combs has sold his waterfront mansion on Miami's Star Island for $55 million, according to property records reviewed by The Real Deal. The six-bedroom, eight-and-a-half-bathroom property,...

item.title: Nnamdi Emeh's Trial Adjourned Amid Civil Society Calls for His Release
item.description: The Federal High Court in Awka, Anambra State, has adjourned the trial of whistleblower Nnamdi Emeh until 27 October. Emeh, an IT consultant, was arrested in 2023 after exposing alleged extrajudicial ...

item.title: Christopher Nolan’s ‘The Odyssey’ receives critical acclaim as his best-reviewed film to date
item.description: Christopher Nolan’s adaptation of Homer’s ancient Greek epic, ‘The Odyssey,’ has been hailed by critics as his best-reviewed film to date. The film, released on July 17, stars Matt Damon as Odysseus a...

item.title: Philippine marine biologist's legacy celebrated for conservation efforts
item.description: The death of Dr. Raphael Bosano, a prominent marine biologist, has sparked tributes for his significant contributions to Philippine marine conservation. Bosano, who was killed in a tragic incident, de...

item.title: Emma Roberts Revisits Aquamarine with Emotional Reunion
item.description: Emma Roberts is set to return as Claire in Disney+'s Aquamarine spinoff, a project that has reignited her emotional connection to the original 2000 film. While expressing excitement about reprising he...
